compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based auto speed control, negative pressure regulation, separate day/night speed profiles
compatible_devices.notes: Prima Klima ECblue fans sold directly in GrowControl shop; standard RJ45 cable (RJEC pin layout); 2 dedicated EC fan ports; full 0-10V speed control with RPM feedback

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: GrowControl Cable RJ45-open ends EC or GrowControl Cable RJ45-jack plug
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based auto speed control, negative pressure regulation, separate day/night speed profiles
compatible_devices.notes: GrowControl offers open-end cable for fans with screw terminals and jack-to-RJ45 cable for fans with 3.5mm jack; fan must be voltage-controlled (0-10V); temperature-controlled EC fans not supported; S&P TD-Silent series may have issues

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: SANlight EVO 4-100, SANlight Q6W Gen2, SANlight STIXX driver
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: SANlight GrowControl Adapter (EVO) or SANlight GrowControl Adapter (Q-Series Gen2)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: EVO series uses 0-10V (turns off at 0V, Schuko not required for complete shutdown); socket 4 at 2300W with 2-pole disconnect recommended for high-wattage arrays

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: RJ45 0-10V via LLT M12 push-lock adapter
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Cable uses LLT M12 push-lock connector; 0-10V dimming + sunrise/sunset; socket 4 at 2300W with 2-pole disconnect recommended for large Lumatek arrays

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V/1-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Adapter cable listed by retailer; socket 4 at 2300W with 2-pole disconnect recommended for 1-10V variants requiring Schuko for complete off

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: GrowControl Cable RJ45-0-10V or custom wiring (pin assignment of luminaire must be known)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V/1-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: All LEDs with 0-10V input supported; 1-10V LEDs require socket 4 (2300W, 2-pole) for complete off; pin assignment of luminaire must be known before wiring

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Day/night timer switching, event timer scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only, no dimming; socket 4 rated 2300W with 2-pole disconnect and inrush current limiter handles up to 1000W HPS/CMH ballasts

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: On/off based on temp/humidity/CO2 setpoints, separate day/night settings
compatible_devices.notes: Standard AC duct fans with running capacitor; on/off only (no speed control); max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3); S&P TD-Silent series may have issues; intake/exhaust modes supported

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based humidity auto-regulation, separate day/night RH setpoints
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V humidifier; automatic on/off based on humidity sensor and VPD setpoint; max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based humidity auto-regulation; dehumidification also achievable via EC exhaust fan speed increase
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V dehumidifier via Schuko; also supports dehumidification via exhaust fan speed modulation; max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 setpoint auto-regulation (daytime only, requires CarbSense sensor); sensor-less CO2 timer mode also available
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 generators and solenoid valves (230V) via Schuko socket; CarbSense CO2 sensor (RJ45) for closed-loop control; CO2 operates in daytime only

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature setpoint auto-regulation, separate day/night temp setpoints, predictive temperature control
compatible_devices.notes: Electric heaters via Schuko; socket 4 (2300W) for high-wattage heaters; sockets 1-3 each 1200W; heating mat with dedicated RJ45 temp sensor also supported

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Interval timer and event timer-based irrigation scheduling; day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V water/irrigation pump via Schuko; timer-based scheduling; max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer-based scheduling (daily, interval, event timers); day/night mode
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V circulation fan via Schuko; on/off only; max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3)

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CarbSense CO2 sensor, PresSense negative pressure sensor, IRCube leaf temperature sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Multi-sensor averaging for redundancy; VPD calculation from temp+humidity; predictive climate control using sensor history; CO2 setpoint feedback loop
compatible_devices.notes: 8 RJ45 ports including MOSFET DC output; multi-sensor support (multiple sensors of same type); humidity+temperature sensor included; CarbSense, PresSense, IRCube sold separately

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Individually programmable socket functions; up to 25 total sockets via 4x daisy-chained PowerExtender units
compatible_devices.notes: PowerExtender 4+ adds 4 Schuko sockets (2x 2300W, 2x 600W) plus dimming and DC output; up to 4 units daisy-chained; explicitly documented as GrowBase Pro accessory
